title: Meeting Notes
html:
Meeting Title

Date: YYYY-MM-DD · Time: HH:MM — HH:MM
Attendees: Alice, Bob, Carol
Note-taker: You

Agenda

  1. Status update — 10 min
  2. Decision item — 30 min
  3. Open questions — 15 min
  4. Action items review — 5 min

Discussion

Status update

Replace this paragraph with the key points raised.

Decision item

Decision: Replace with the decision that was made.
Owner: who is responsible · Deadline: when

Action items

  • Alice — write up technical proposal — by 2026-MM-DD
  • Bob — schedule follow-up with stakeholders — by 2026-MM-DD
  • You — distribute notes to attendees — by EOD

Parking lot

  • Topics that came up but weren't addressed — capture for the next meeting
